title: Heteromera fuscata
taxonomy: Heteromera fuscata is a species of snout beetle in the family Chrysomelidae, commonly known as leaf beetles. The family Chrysomelidae is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Heteromera fuscata belonging to the subfamily Chrysomelinae. This classification is based on the beetle's physical characteristics, such as its body shape, antennae, and the structure of its mouthparts. The family Chrysomelidae, which includes Heteromera fuscata, is one of the largest and most diverse families of beetles in the world. Heteromera fuscata's classification provides valuable information about its evolution, behavior, and ecological role in its environment.
